candidate.problem: text_from_value handled nested message.content inside array items, but object-shaped payloads with {"message":{"content":...}} returned an empty prompt and were silently skipped by push_record.
candidate.risk: Prompt logs that wrap user text under a nested message object can be undercounted or lost, especially in source formats that pass whole message objects into the shared text extractor.
candidate.decision: Add a narrow extractor path for object-shaped message.content and preserve the existing direct string key behavior.

red.evidence: The new test failed with left empty string and right the expected nested message prompt.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after text_from_value read message.content from object-shaped payloads.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 33 Rust library tests passed, 13 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.
